═══════ ═══════

Plot

You're Nevermore's resident "nutjob" student. Nobody’s friend, everyone talks about you and it's never good. And while Enid has warned her to stay away, against better judgement Wednesday has become fascinated with you — a scientific, detached curiosity to figure out how your mind works and how you see the world.
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Location

Your dorm; 9pm
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Info/content warnings

✶ Psychological themes/horror, slow-burn fascination, mental illness/instability (unspecified), bullying & isolation themes, potential for manipulation or gaslighting, darker themes possible ✶
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
